title: The Light Across the Street
writer: Jean-Claude Aurel, Louis Chavance, Jacques Gauthier
actors: Raymond Pellegrin, Roger Pigaut, Brigitte Bardot
plot: Story in flashback of an injured restaurant owner told to avoid straining himself with his wife, and the new young garage manager across the street who desires her. Considered the first film to showcase Bardot's natural sensuality.
